return(function(...)local return(J(14930383-((-579623+1142978)+-846257),{}))(Y(b))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[x(218813+(-224311-(-588)))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
